name: Frogmore Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a large stew pot about half full of water.
2. Add lemon juice to the pot (include the lemon rind if desired).
3. Incorporate as much shrimp and crab boil as you prefer (I use a whole bottle, but my wife prefers about 2/3 of a bottle).
4. Cut the potatoes into large chunks and add them along with the corn on the cob.
5. Cook for approximately 10 minutes, then add the chopped onions.
6. Continue cooking until the corn and potatoes are tender; then add the shrimp (cut into "wheels") and sausage.
7. Cook until the shrimp are done, which takes about 3 to 4 additional minutes.
8. Serve with a side dish like slaw or bread, hot mustard with sausage, tarter sauce with shrimp, and your favorite beverage for milder flavor. Enjoy!
